contract: design/content/build plan, selected architecture, asset needs

artifact.planningNote: Phase-contract specialist for Phase 3 is local-ai-visibility, which is narrower than 'DESIGN' (it generates llms.txt / FAQPage / GEO markup / crawler directives). This artifact delivers the FULL Phase 3 design/content/build plan the contract requires (designContentBuildPlan, selectedArchitecture, assetNeeds) and folds the AI-visibility deliverables in as one section. Seam flagged, consistent with the Phase 2 planner seam. Founder-catalog caveat honored: llms.txt is a low-priority machine-readable fact surface, NOT a ranking lever.

selectedArchitecture.rationale: Matches the founder-catalog template stack (Base.astro, astro.config, @astrojs/sitemap); static site required (per Phase 0: any form must post to an external service, never a first-party handler).
selectedArchitecture.hosting: Static host with _headers + netlify.toml support (Netlify-class). Exact deploy target TBD at Phase 7 (owner has no domain/host yet).
selectedArchitecture.routing: File-based; 32 routes from the Phase 2 matrix, mapped by page-kind to layouts.

schemaStack.rule: Every non-business node references provider/isPartOf = {@id}; never re-declare NAP. Emit conditional types only when source data exists (FAQPage iff real FAQs).

pageHeadSignals: geo meta quartet (region/placename/position/ICBM) for Cedar Rapids

perf: system-font body + async-swap display font for headings
idle-deferred GA4 ONLY IF analytics later configured (currently none)
security: _headers + netlify.toml: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy

brandSystem.typography: Display font (async-swap) for headings; system-font stack for body (perf).
brandSystem.voice: Soul-food, family-owned, made-fresh-to-order; owner authority (Ray Aqel, restaurateur since 2006). No hype, no fabricated claims.
brandSystem.logo: To be created (navy/gold) — nautical + fish/chicken motif.

layouts: page-kind layouts: Home, MenuHub, MenuCategory, IntentLanding, Occasion, LocalLanding, About, Contact, Faq, Story

croComponents.hero: h1 + 3-value-prop strip (made fresh to order / does both fish and chicken right / family-owned)
croComponents.dualCta: CALL-ONLY (tel:+13192211040). No SMS affordance — CSB-dual-cta unresolved; text button omitted until an SMS number is provided.
croComponents.stickyCallBar: fixed mobile bar, call-only, mounted once in Base layout
croComponents.midCtaBanner: 'Call ahead — your order's hot when you arrive.' (tel: anchor)
croComponents.trustGrid: OMITTED site-wide (<6 real facts). Brand-story facts surface on /about + /how-we-cook instead.
croComponents.leadForm: BLOCKED — required on home + contact but no external endpoint. Designed as a pluggable block: OMITTED until an https endpoint + email exist. Shippable fallback = phone + map + hours + directions. NOTE: home/contact FAIL the cro-block-presence gate until endpoint provided OR Yahya records an exception.

contentSourcing.menuPages: From owner-confirmed menu items only. Prices OMITTED. Press-sourced additions (liver, mashed potatoes, mac & cheese) shown only after owner confirms.
contentSourcing.occasionPages: From the occasion taxonomy (family dinner, Friday fish fry, game-day wings, quick lunch, late-night, weekend dinner) — real customer moments; no catering.
contentSourcing.intentLandings: From keyword/entity clusters (fried fish / fried chicken / soul food / seafood / best catfish CR).
contentSourcing.aboutStory: Owner facts: since 2006, MN/IL/MI track record, first Iowa location, made-to-order.
contentSourcing.localPage: Mound View real facts only (1st Ave NE corridor, near Hy-Vee, onsite parking, large dining room). No fabricated landmarks.
contentSourcing.faq: Real Q/A: most popular (catfish), hours, parking, dine-in (dining room exists), how to order, delivery apps.
contentSourcing.antiFabrication: No prices, no ratings, no fake reviews, no invented town facts. Omit-never-fabricate (KG7).

aiVisibilityArtifacts.llmsTxt: Two-tier fact surface (index: differentiators, per-dish lines, hours, key pages, curated FAQ; full: per-page FAQ, menu, URL-pattern doc). Treated as LOW-PRIORITY hygiene per founder-catalog June-2026 GEO caveat (Mueller: no major AI system consumes llms.txt). Value is the citable facts, not ranking.
aiVisibilityArtifacts.geoAnswerUnits: 'Key Takeaways' answer boxes above the fold on intent/occasion pages (catfish = most popular; NE-side location; made-to-order).
aiVisibilityArtifacts.crawlerDirectives: robots.txt: ADD OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, Claude-SearchBot/Claude-User, Applebot/Applebot-Extended, meta-externalagent; DROP Google-Extended (training opt-out, not a visibility lever); /admin disallow. Surface trade-offs at review.
aiVisibilityArtifacts.indexNow: Optional; only if a deploy host + key are set (Phase 7).

designContentBuildPlan.crossLinkMesh: occasion -> menu items; menu-category -> occasions + intent; dish -> intent landing; all -> home + /menu hubs; local -> home + order.
carriedBlockers: CSB-lead-form (home/contact, must resolve before Phase 4 build gate)

imagery.constraint: Representational only — appetizing generic food is fine; generated storefront/interior/owner images MUST NOT misrepresent the specific real premises or person. Prefer food-forward imagery.
imagery.slots: 15 slots from Phase 2 imageSlotPlan (hero, per-category food, occasions, how-we-cook, about, storefront/local).

assetNeeds.fonts: 1 display font (async-swap, self-hosted or Google async) for headings; system stack body.
assetNeeds.map: Contact page: static map image or plain map link for 1616 1st Ave NE (no API key; static site).
assetNeeds.analytics: None wired (owner has no GA4). Leave a documented insertion point only.

seamsFlagged: Phase 3 specialist local-ai-visibility is narrower than DESIGN; full design plan produced here.
Phase 4 specialist 'content-writer' has NO skill file (mapping decision still pending before Phase 4 build).
handoffToPhase4: Build 32 Astro routes per the layouts + schema stack + CRO components above.
RESOLVE before build gate: CSB-lead-form (endpoint+email or exception) and CSB-dual-cta (SMS or accept call-only).
DECIDE the content-writer specialist mapping (vendored seo-content-writer / write-content, or add a first-party skill).
No prices, no ratings, no fabricated imagery/town facts.
